item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: I’ll inspect the three relevant source files, make the minimal schema/model/query changes, then run the test suite against the configured database.

item.text: The source model stores each entity as JSONB, while the shared generator currently creates only normalized columns. I’m aligning `ensureSchema` with the JSONB model (including an optional payment-method constraint) so the existing order/invoice paths and the new account property use the real schema consistently.

item.text:
Implemented preferred payment method support.

- `accounts` JSONB schema accepts optional `credit_card`, `wire_transfer`, `ach`, or `paypal`.
- Account create/update validates and stores it.
- Order summaries now include `preferredPaymentMethod`.

Verified with `npm test` — all acceptance tests pass.
